notes: Worked and performed like native, in windowed and fullscreen modes.
title: Rock of Ages 2: Bigger & Boulder™

notes: Following the guide in the "Runtime Config Options" section of the Proton readme, I used the PROTON_USE_WINED3D11 option to use OpenGL-based wined3d instead of Vulkan-based DXVK for d3d11. Without that option set, I got a "DX11 feature level 10.0 is required to run the engine" error at startup.
title: Rock of Ages 2: Bigger & Boulder™

notes: Sound settings don't do anything, but this seems to be an Windows issue as well. Clicking on Multiplayer fails, but joining somebody via Steam works fine. Has FPS drops on a few maps, but if you avoid those it runs perfect.
title: Rock of Ages 2: Bigger & Boulder™
